titleStmt.title: SII 22.254: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 254. (A.R. No. 254 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE INNER SIDE OF THE WEST WALL OF THE FIRST PRĀKĀRA. DĒVARĀYA-UḌAIYAR (DĒVARĀYA I) SON OF HARIHARA II—Śaka 1320 (current)

summary.p: This inscription is badly damaged. It is dated in Īśvara, Kanyā, śu. 10, Wednesday, Uttiram, corresponding to A.D. 1397, September 2, but the week day was Sunday. It seems to register the sale of land by five persons to the Ūravar of Kaṇṇippākkam for twenty poṉ for digging a feeder channel from the river to the irrigation tank of their village, after getting the latter repaired Mention is made of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Sāmayadēva-Mahārāja son of Vēṅgi Tribhuvanamalla Chaḷukki-Nārāyaṇa Sūryadēva-Mahārāja who was probably the regional administrator at the time.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
suvasti śrī makāmaṇṭalicuran Ariyarāyavibhāṭan pāṣaikkut tappuva rāyar kaṇṭan muvarāyarakaṇṭan pūṟuvatekṣaṇa Uttira camuttirātipati śrīvira Ariyaṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar tevarāya Uṭaiyar piṟativi Irācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 10 3[2 10]- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa Icuvaṟa varuṣam kaṉṉi nāyaṟṟu puṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattunāḷ śrīmanmakā maṇṭalicuran veṅkitrihuvanamalla caḷukkanārāyaṇa cūriyatevamakārācāviṉ kumāra cāmayyatevamahārāyarkku jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kāliyūrkoṭṭattu pirammatecappaṟṟu nittaviṉotanallūr
Oḻukkaippākkam Oḻukkaipākkiḻāṉ mutaliyāṉa vāṇātarāyaṉ perumāḷ tirumākatappiḷḷai Eṟappiḷḷai nāyiṉāṉ villavarāyaṉ kaṇṇuṭaiya perumāḷ kaṇṇipākkattukku Āṟṟukkāl vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭukkāmal kaṇṇip pākkattukku Eri Uṭaintapaṭiyālum Itukku yeṟunir pāyttal Illātapaṭiālum Eṅkaḷaip porunta kaṇṇippākkattukku Āṟṟukkālkoṇṭu kuṭutta nilam pukutap pāñcāṉ maṭaiyile kuṟutti vaṭacāṟṟukkup pokiṟa vaḻikkuk kiḻakku cāṉavariyum ṟe Uṭaippaṇa ccevvaikkuk kiḻ nattalaipaṭappaiākak koṇṭu maṇal kāl teṉmaṭal Itu ḷavākavum maṇikka
kavum Āka kaṇṇipākkattu Ūravarkku koṇṭu kuṭukka vilaikku niṟceyitta � 2 10 Ippaṇam Irupatukkum viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ippaṇam Irupatu Ippaṭi cammatittu Āṟṟukkāl vilaip piṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta koḷḷavum kaṇṇipākkam Ūravar Ippaṭikku Ivai Oḻukkaipākkiḻān mutaliyār Eḻuttu Oḻukkaipākkiḻān perumāḷ Eḻuttu Oḻukkaipākkiḻān ṉāyanāṉ Eḻuttu Oḻukkaipākkiḻāṉ Eṟap piḷḷai Eḻuttu Oḻukkaipākkiḻāṉ tirumākatappiḷḷai Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
